SEARCH
Package com.nib.grammars

Interface IkjeftParserListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
IkjeftParserBaseListener
public interface IkjeftParserListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by IkjeftParser.
